name: Western Union
description_short: Fort Worth, TX's Western Union location at Dollar General provides convenient money transfer and check-cashing services open daily 8AM-10PM.
description_long:
Western Union at the Dollar General location in Fort Worth, TX offers money transfer and check-cashing services to the community. This location is conveniently situated for residents needing quick access to financial services. The store is open 8AM-10PM, seven days a week, making it accessible for early morning and evening transactions.

At this Fort Worth location, you can send and receive money transfers domestically and internationally, cash checks, and access other financial services. Call +1 682-231-8813 to confirm available services and ask about rates and fees. The staff can assist with all your money transfer needs throughout the day and week.

For Fort Worth residents requiring reliable money transfer services, this Western Union location in TX provides convenient access with extended hours every day. Remember to bring a valid government-issued ID for any transaction, and have recipient information ready if sending money. It's a quick, straightforward service available daily in your neighborhood.
address: Dollar General, 3900 Hemphill St, Fort Worth, TX 76110

company_info.headquarters: Dollar General, 3900 Hemphill St, Fort Worth, TX 76110

pros: Extensive global agent network enabling cash pickup in numerous countries without bank account requirement
Multi-language support (English, Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, Vietnamese) for diverse populations
Real-time transfer tracking functionality for customer transparency
Multiple funding and receiving options including cash pickup, card deposits, and bill payment
Mobile top-up services for international customers
Loyalty rewards program for repeat customers
Ability to pay bills and send money through single integrated platform
cons: Higher fees compared to bank transfers and modern digital payment apps
Limited pricing transparency on website; customers must request estimates for each transaction
Service availability dependent on agent location network, which may be limited in rural areas
Geolocation features require browser permissions and may not work reliably
No indication of competitive rates or fee comparison tools on website
best_for: International immigrants sending money to family in home countries without bank accounts
Unbanked and underbanked populations requiring cash-based money transfer services
Customers in countries with limited banking infrastructure who need reliable money pickup
People requiring bill payment services without traditional checking accounts
diagnosis: Western Union is best for unbanked and underbanked populations, particularly immigrants needing reliable international money transfers and cash pickup services without bank accounts. The main caveat is that fees are significantly higher than modern digital payment alternatives, making it less suitable for price-sensitive customers who have access to banking services or apps like Wise, PayPal, or Remitly.
services: Direct card deposit for money receipt
meta_description: Fort Worth, TX Western Union | Money transfers, check cashing at Dollar General. Open 8AM-10PM daily.
